2024-07-12.thesis: ADVANCE Act nuclear bill signed into law
2024-07-12.exit_case: ADVANCE Act was signed into law July 9 — the exact catalyst has already occurred and stocks already popped on it.
2024-07-12.assessment: I entered on the ADVANCE Act signing, but per this week's news the bill was already signed into law July 9 with strong bipartisan support, and NuScale (SMR), Cameco, and Energy Fuels already spiked on it. The specific discrete catalyst has fully resolved and is public/priced. What remains is a broader nuclear/uranium theme and momentum — not my edge. No pending catalyst leg left to hold for.
2024-07-12.exit_advice: Exit. The bill is signed and the pop is priced in — edge is gone the moment you entered.

2024-08-02.thesis: PJM capacity auction prices jumped ninefold year-over-year
2024-08-02.exit_case: Auction cleared and results are public; ninefold price jump already announced and stocks already spiked, so the catalyst may be a done, priced event.
2024-08-02.assessment: Entry week. PJM base residual auction cleared ~ninefold higher YoY, a windfall for merchant generators with large capacity to sell. CEG (nuclear fleet) and VST (nuclear + IPP) are the direct beneficiaries and both spiked on the print. Catalyst is fresh; edge is market underappreciating the durable multi-year capacity-revenue tailwind versus a single-session reaction. Watching for the reprice to complete or any FERC challenge to auction results.
2024-08-02.exit_advice: The auction clearing is discrete and public, but capacity payments at these elevated prices flow through the 2025/26 delivery year — the multi-year earnings re-rate is not yet fully digested from a one-day pop. Hold while that repricing is pending; exit once forward estimates fully reflect the uplift.

2024-08-09.thesis: PJM capacity auction prices jumped ninefold year-over-year
2024-08-09.exit_case: The ninefold PJM auction already cleared and published pre-entry — result is public, priced, no pending event remains.
2024-08-09.assessment: Re-reading the whole journal: the auction result that defines this event was known at entry and is now fully public. There is no forward discrete trigger still pending — only the hope that the reprice 'completes,' which is crowding/momentum, not catalyst. That fails the thesis_live test. No developments this week touched CEG/VST or PJM specifically.
2024-08-09.exit_advice: Exit. The specific catalyst (PJM base residual auction clearing ~9x higher) is a discrete, already-occurred and publicly-disseminated event. My entry rationale — market 'underappreciating the durable tailwind vs a single-session reaction' — is a reprice/hype argument, not a pending catalyst. No FERC challenge or new auction event is live this week; the week's news is pure macro noise with zero PJM relevance. Edge is gone.

2024-08-16.exit_case: Deal signed at $83.50; if K already trades at deal price, spread is gone and arb edge exhausted.
2024-08-16.assessment: Entry week. Mars announced definitive $36B agreement to acquire Kellanova at $83.50/share cash (signed Aug 14). Catalyst is deal COMPLETION, which remains pending antitrust review (US FTC, EU) with expected close H1 2025 — spread still open, edge live. This week's news is pure macro/market noise (Sensex, US retail sales, Nasdaq rally) with zero deal-specific content. K remains the sole and purest vehicle — the target being acquired for cash. No signs of regulatory pushback or financing risk yet.
2024-08-16.exit_advice: Hold as merger-arb until deal closes or breaks; exit if regulators (FTC/EU) signal blocking or if spread compresses fully to $83.50.

2024-08-23.thesis: Couche-Tard preliminary takeover offer for 7-Eleven owner
2024-08-23.exit_case: Offer is only preliminary and non-binding; no board approval, price, or deal signed yet — catalyst still pending.
2024-08-23.assessment: Entry week. Couche-Tard's preliminary takeover approach for Seven & i is fresh and unresolved — no price agreed, no board acceptance, regulatory (FEFTA foreign-ownership) hurdles unaddressed. This is a pending M&A catalyst with clear re-rating potential. SVNDY (Seven & i ADR) is the sole and purest target vehicle. Thesis live.
2024-08-23.exit_advice: Hold while the bid remains live and unresolved; exit if Seven & i formally rejects or a definitive deal is signed.

2024-09-13.exit_case: Federal Court approved the acquisition this week — the last real hurdle cleared; close now a formality
2024-09-13.assessment: Entered on the Base Resources acquisition closing Oct 2, 2024. This week the Federal Court of Australia approved the transformational combination, confirming the Oct 2 close date. The specific catalyst I entered on — the actual close — has NOT yet occurred; it remains pending for ~3 weeks. Court approval de-risks but does not equal close. UUUU remains the sole and purest vehicle as the acquirer. Thesis live until the deal closes.
2024-09-13.exit_advice: Hold into the Oct 2 close; exit shortly after the deal actually closes when the catalyst is fully priced
